title: 67 lugs with status field inconsistencies
description: Scan detected 67 lugs with status inconsistencies: 66 missing updated_at field, 1 with mismatched status vs s field, and unowned in_progress lugs. This indicates systemic process gaps in lug lifecycle management.

title: Critical test coverage gap: inverted testing pyramid with 5% coverage
description: Framework has only ~5% test coverage with inverted testing pyramid (14 E2E tests, 0 unit tests, 0 integration tests). Test coverage report from March 18 identifies 42 needed unit tests and 21 integration tests. This represents a systemic quality risk for the framework.

title: 3 E2E tests failing out of 14 (79% pass rate)
description: Current E2E test suite has 3 failing tests out of 14 total. Test coverage report (March 18) notes: 'wai.md Missing Sections (needs investigation)', 'Inbox Routing Rules Undocumented (missing routing rules for delivery_confirmation, phone-home)', and one additional unspecified failure. Integration test workflow is configured but producing no active tests.

title: Test coverage report is 3 months stale (last updated March 18)
description: The comprehensive TEST-COVERAGE-REPORT.md in framework/tests/ was last updated on 2026-03-18, now 88 days old. The report documents test infrastructure gaps but has not been updated or acted upon. This gap has likely grown as the codebase evolved without proportional test growth.
